meta_title: For Students: Antigravity project template to Solve slow development speed (Intermediate Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome slow development speed. A Intermediate-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Master Antigravity: Accelerate App Development for Students
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with slow development. Learn to use the Antigravity project template and Claude Code to build high-quality software at lightning speed.
content.answer_block: Slow development speed is the primary barrier for student developers. By using the Antigravity project template, you standardize your architecture and automate boilerplate. Combined with Claude Code's intelligent CLI, you can transform high-level requirements into production-ready features in minutes, allowing you to focus on logic rather than repetitive configuration.
content.intro:
You are staring at a blank screen, the cursor blinking rhythmically, mocking your progress. You have the vision for a game-changing SaaS app, but you find yourself trapped in a labyrinth of boilerplate, dependency hell, and configuration nightmares. The industry doesn't wait for students to slowly wire up authentication and database schemas; it rewards those who ship.

There is a better way. The Antigravity project template acts as your professional scaffold, providing an opinionated, production-ready foundation. When paired with Claude Code, you stop writing repetitive code and start acting as an architect. This tutorial will show you how to bypass the 'slow lane' and build like a senior engineer, ensuring your portfolio stands out in a crowded market.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Scaffold
steps.description: Establish a robust foundation by cloning the template. This eliminates environment setup friction and ensures consistent project structure.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new project using the standard Antigravity template with support for TypeScript and Tailwind CSS.

steps.title: Configure Database Schemas via AI
steps.description: Use Claude Code to define your Prisma or Drizzle schema. This ensures your data layer is typed and optimized from the start.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a user schema with fields for ID, email, subscription status, and created_at timestamps.
steps.claude_code_command: claude 'Generate a robust Prisma schema for a multi-tenant user authentication system'

steps.title: Automate API Route Generation
steps.description: Stop manual route creation. Use the template's patterns to generate CRUD endpoints instantly.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a REST API route for handling user profiles following the Antigravity project structure.
steps.claude_code_command: claude 'Create a secure API route for updating user profile data using the existing middleware'

steps.title: Implement Intelligent Middleware
steps.description: Secure your application by offloading authentication logic to the pre-configured middleware within the template.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Apply authentication middleware to all routes under the /api/dashboard path.
steps.claude_code_command: claude 'Add guard clauses to the dashboard routes using the Auth.js integration'

steps.title: Deployment Pipeline Setup
steps.description: Finalize your project by configuring the build pipeline, ensuring your code is production-ready for platforms like Vercel or Railway.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Add a production build script and CI/CD configuration to the project root.
steps.claude_code_command: claude 'Configure a GitHub Actions workflow for automated testing and deployment'

pro_tips: Always use the '--dry-run' flag with CLI tools to preview file changes before committing to your filesystem.
Treat the Antigravity template as a living document; fork it and add your own custom utility hooks to save time on future projects.
When using Claude Code, provide the file structure tree in the context window to improve code generation accuracy.
Prioritize 'Type-Safety First' by having Claude generate Zod schemas for every API input; it prevents 90% of runtime bugs.
Keep your git commits granular—one feature per commit—to make it easier for recruiters to audit your technical history.
content.next_steps: After completing this template setup, deploy your first version to a live URL and share the repository link on your LinkedIn profile to showcase your ability to use professional-grade tooling.
content.conversion_block: You now have the technical blueprint to build faster than 99% of your peers. Don't just learn—ship. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
